class.name: ASEventTagHistoricalEntry
class.description:
ASEventTagHistoricalEntry stores a complete event occurrence in the historical buffer. Contains the full event data plus the tick when it was recorded, enabling precise event tracking and rollback.
Used by ASComponent's event history buffer to maintain a chronological record of all events for analysis, debugging, and multiplayer synchronization purposes.
Combined with the historical query APIs, enables powerful event analysis like "did damage occur in the last 2 seconds" or "how many times was this ability activated recently".

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the historical entry to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads historical entry from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The complete event data for this historical entry.
The tick when this event was recorded.
